name: Hops
summary: It is best framed around bitter-resin and prenylflavonoid chemistry with modest selected human evidence.
description: It is best framed around bitter-resin and prenylflavonoid chemistry with modest selected human evidence.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: Herbal Products Used in Menopause and for Gynecological Disorders
Medicinal Plants Used for Anxiety, Depression, or Stress Treatment: An Update
Botanicals and Their Bioactive Phytochemicals for Women's Health
v9.5: Systematic review suggests possible sleep-quality benefit but trials were heterogeneous and often methodologically weak; keep below melatonin/magnesium.

claimMap.claim: v9.5: Human sleep evidence commonly involves valerian/hops combinations; isolated hops should stay research-only.
claimMap.notes: v9.5: Human sleep evidence commonly involves valerian/hops combinations; isolated hops should stay research-only.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Product-specific; many human sleep products combine hops with valerian, limiting isolated-hop conclusions

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Strobile tea/tincture/extract and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Strobile tea/tincture/extract and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
